characters.name: KATI
characters.description: Väike inimene, ümarate põskedega ja rõõmsameelse naeratava näoga. Tal on seljas soe sinine talvemantel, roosa müts peas ja roosad kindad kätes. Armas multifilmistiil, sõbralik ja elav.

characters.name: PRIIT
characters.description: Väike inimene, entusiastliku ja sõbraliku näoga. Tal on seljas soe roheline talvemantel, sinine müts peas ja sinised kindad kätes. Armas multifilmistiil, uudishimulik ja abivalmis.

locations.name: LUMINE PARK
locations.description: A vast open snowy park with gentle snow-covered hills in the distance. Bare deciduous trees covered in a thick layer of pristine white snow line the edges of the park. The sky is bright, clear winter blue with a few soft clouds. The ground is covered in undisturbed, sparkling white snow. No specific man-made structures are present, just a natural winter landscape. Cartoon style, bright and inviting.

pages.scene: Kati and Priit are standing in a vast open snowy park. Kati is smiling brightly, and Priit is looking around with a curious expression. Both are dressed warmly in their winter coats, hats, and gloves. The ground is covered in white snow, and snow-covered trees are visible in the distance under a clear blue winter sky. Cartoon style, full body shot.

Kati and Priit are looking down at the pristine, untouched white snow covering the ground of the park. Kati points playfully at the snow, and Priit is crouching slightly to touch it with his gloved hand. They are both smiling. Snow-covered trees are in the background. Cartoon style, focus on the children and the snow.

Kati and Priit are standing close together in the snowy park, looking at each other with excited, thoughtful expressions. Kati has a finger to her chin, and Priit has a wide smile, as if they just had a brilliant idea. The vast snowy park with distant trees and a blue sky is the background. Cartoon style.

Kati and Priit are actively gathering snow. Kati is using her gloved hands to scoop snow into a small mound, looking focused. Priit is pushing a small snowball across the ground, making it bigger. They are both in their winter clothes. The park ground is covered in snow, with traces of their activity. Cartoon style.

Kati and Priit are now shaping a large mound of snow. Kati is smoothing the top of the snow pile with her gloved hands, while Priit is patting the side, forming a round shape. They are both smiling and working together. A half-formed snow creature shape is visible between them. Cartoon style.

The snow creature has grown significantly bigger, now clearly resembling a large, round snow animal's body. Kati and Priit are standing next to it, admiring their work. Kati claps her hands lightly, and Priit looks up at the big snow shape with an impressed smile. Snow-covered trees are in the background. Cartoon style.

Kati is carefully pushing a bright orange carrot into the front of the snow creature, creating a nose. Priit is standing next to her, watching with a supportive and excited smile. The large, round snow creature is a prominent feature in the scene. Both children are wearing their winter clothes. Cartoon style.

Priit is gently placing two small, dark pebbles onto the snow creature's face, making them look like eyes. Kati is smiling and pointing to where the eyes should go, helping him. The snow creature now has a carrot nose and eyes. They are both happy and focused on their task. Cartoon style.

Kati and Priit are standing proudly next to their finished snow creature, which now clearly resembles a cute, friendly snow bear or rabbit with a carrot nose and pebble eyes. They are both beaming with joy and satisfaction, pointing at their creation. The background is the snowy park. Cartoon style.

Kati and Priit are giving each other a happy high-five, celebrating their achievement. The finished snow creature stands proudly beside them. They are both laughing and smiling broadly, clearly delighted with their day of play and creation. The snowy park is bright and cheerful. Cartoon style.
